heroDescription.processed: At Flour & Fold, we believe the best things in life are made from scratch. Every loaf, pastry, and cake is handcrafted using time-honored techniques, premium ingredients, and a whole lot of love. Stop by for a fresh-baked treat and a perfectly pulled espresso.

ctaDescription.processed: From birthday cakes to wedding dessert tables, our pastry team creates stunning custom creations for every occasion. Place your order at least 48 hours in advance.
